name: overgrow
description: SEO + GEO toolkit for growth engineers. 8 skills (init, audit, spawn-pages, spawn-blogs, spawn-internal-links, sitemap, llmstxt, humanize) to inventory pages, audit on-page signals, spawn landing pages and blogs via query-fanout, wire semantic internal links, build sitemap/robots, generate llms.txt, and humanize AI-sounding copy.
